name: Azure DevOps
description: Monitor Azure DevOps repositories, projects, and teams for development and access compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to Azure DevOps > User Settings (top right) > Personal access tokens
2. Create a new token with Read permissions for Code, Project and Team
3. Paste the token below

credentialFields.label: Personal Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Create a PAT in Azure DevOps > User Settings > Personal access tokens. No encoding needed - just paste the token.

checks.name: Code Changes
checks.description: Lists Azure DevOps Git repositories to verify code changes are tracked

checks.name: Separation of Environments
checks.description: Verifies Azure DevOps projects exist for environment separation

checks.name: Access Review Log
checks.description: Reviews Azure DevOps teams for access review log
